heading: Prohibition on excessive waiting periods
label: 300gg–7 Prohibition on excessive waiting periods
text: A group health plan and a health insurance issuer offering group health insurance coverage shall not apply any waiting period (as defined in ) that exceeds 90 days.section 300gg–3(b)(4) of this title
